strategy.positioning: Loop X builds machine intelligence for the most uncontrolled environments — mining, underground, dust, glare, total dark. Thermal perception that works with no tag, no map, and no light required. Where GPS fails, LiDAR blinds out, and cameras go dark, Loop X sees.
strategy.audience: Mine operators, autonomy engineers, and heavy-industry ops leads responsible for machine safety, uptime, and productivity in visibility-hostile environments. An operations lead should understand the value on the first scroll.
products: Collision Avoidance System — 360° detection preventing machine-to-machine and machine-to-person incidents in low-visibility conditions.
Load Sight System — real-time load monitoring for haul trucks and loaders in dust and dark.
LoopX SLAM — thermal-fused SLAM for autonomous navigation without GPS or optical reference.
strategy.belief: Autonomy is won in the dark. The most dangerous environments deserve the most intelligence.

voice.guidelines: Intelligence-led authority. Confident, spare, declarative. Two registers held together: the grounded (precise, material, data-dense) and the expansive (ambitious, frontier-facing). Collective 'we'. Clarity as a value — an operations lead gets it on the first scroll. Display / headlines set UPPERCASE; body sentence case; labels UPPERCASE mono. Em dashes for asides. Short paragraphs. No exclamation. Technical specificity is welcome.
examples: Autonomy is won in the dark
The most dangerous environments deserve the most intelligence
So we started where it's hardest

art.photography: Black-and-white, high-contrast, grainy. Terrain and rock; dust and particle clouds on black; cave / underground; thermal captures. Cool, austere-industrial. Always desaturated, pushed contrast.
art.framing: Wide, orthogonal. Square-edged and hairline-ruled. Full-bleed heroes with black protection gradients over imagery only where legibility demands it. No decorative gradients.
art.grade: Desaturated to grayscale, contrast pushed. Deep blacks, textured mid-tones.
referenceCues: thermal capture of terrain at night
sensor array on machinery, orthogonal composition

copywriter.label: Tighten
copywriter.prompt: Cut every unnecessary word. Preserve meaning, sharpen tone.

copywriter.label: Rewrite as tagline
copywriter.prompt: One line, max 8 words, in brand voice.

copywriter.label: Headline
copywriter.prompt: A display headline in the brand voice. UPPERCASE if the brand direction calls for it.

copywriter.label: Explain simply
copywriter.prompt: Rewrite in plain language for someone unfamiliar with the category.

artDirector.label: Hero horizontal
artDirector.hint: wide landscape composition, low horizon, headroom for wordmark

artDirector.label: Social square
artDirector.hint: eye-level composition, headroom for wordmark, negative space bottom-left

artDirector.label: Story portrait
artDirector.hint: vertical, subject centred, minimal background clutter
